taskDescription: Complete the crossword puzzle on heart and pericardium anatomy.

words.clue: Sac surrounding the heart, composed of fibrous and serous layers
Pericardial sinus behind the aorta and pulmonary trunk, used for clamping during bypass surgery
Life-threatening compression of the heart by fluid in the pericardial cavity
Left anterior descending artery, most commonly blocked coronary vessel (abbreviation)
Node that is the natural pacemaker of the heart (abbreviation: __ node)
Venous drainage channel on the posterior surface of the heart
Inner lining of the heart chambers
Clinical triad for cardiac tamponade, named after a surgeon
The visceral layer of serous pericardium, also called the ___
